name: Cecilia the Rikka Queen
desc:
2 Plant monsters
If this card is Link Summoned using a "Rikka" monster as material: You can target 1 "Rikka" monster in your GY; Special Summon it.
You can Tribute 1 monster that mentions "Rikka" from your Deck and 1 monster that mentions "Rikka" on your field, then target 1 "Rikka" Xyz Monster on your field; attach 2 cards from your GY or banishment to that monster as materials, also that monster gains ATK equal to this monster's ATK until your opponent's End Phase.
You can only use each effect of "Cecilia the Rikka Queen" once per turn.
